ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "size_mm" TEXT /* Size specification of the component (e.g., 0603) */,
  "dimensions_mm" TEXT /* Length and Width of the component in mm */,
  "tolerance_a_mm" TEXT /* Tolerance range for dimension a in mm */,
  "tolerance_b_mm" TEXT /* Tolerance range for dimension b in mm */,
  "tolerance_c_mm" TEXT /* Tolerance range for dimension c in mm */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "manufacturer_part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the technical datasheet of the component */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Average lead time in days for procurement */,
  "environmental_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component meets environmental compliance standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Resistors, Capacitors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Further classification within the main category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on performance and reliability */,
  "lead_time_average" INTEGER /* Average lead time for deliveries from this supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in inventory */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturing site */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger reorder */,
  "reorder_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if a reorder is pending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the site */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that complies with standards */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number issued by the compliance authority */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance certificate was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the compliance certificate */,
  "compliance_standard" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard (e.g., RoHS, CE) */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the authority issuing the compliance certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being used */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the component is used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in production */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project in which the component is used */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department using the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Inventory, Usage) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
